zh.Rastrick, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾拉斯特利可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Toothil於1247年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Richard De Toothill-17歲，母親Cecilia De Toothill-21歲。他和Modesta Eland至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1336年之前在英國越可爾費比。

zh-hans.Rastrick, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾拉斯特利可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Toothil于1247年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Richard De Toothill-17岁，母亲Cecilia De Toothill-21岁。他和Modesta Eland至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1336年之前在英国越可爾費比。

nameMeanings.name: Toothil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from various places named with Old English * tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (WR Yorks) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancs), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwicks), and Tothill (Lincs). There are several further minor place-names of this type that may have contributed to the surname. (ii) locative name, occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), recorded as Totehill in 1251.

variants.name: Tuthill
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of Toothill, primarily a Yorkshire habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (Yorkshire) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancashire), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwickshire), and Tothill (Lincolnshire). There are several further minor placenames of this type that may have contributed to the surname. Also occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), which derives from the Old English personal name Totta (genitive Tottan) + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Tuttle
meanings: possibly a variant of Thirkell, from the Middle English personal name T(h)irkill, T(h)urkill (Old Norse Thorkell, Thorkil, Thurkil, a shortened form of Thorketill from the god's name Thórr ‘Thor’ + ketill ‘kettle, cauldron’).

variants.name: Tott
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Tot(te) (Old English Totta, Tota). See also Totty , Tutt , and compare Sabyna Tottedoghter’, 1379 in Poll Tax (Kirkby Malham, WR Yorks); Radulphus Totusone, 1377 in Poll Tax (Frisby on the Wreak, Leics). Some early bearers may belong with (2) or (3).
2 English: nickname from Middle English tot(te) ‘simpleton, fool’.

3 English: locative name from Middle English tot(e) ‘lookout hill’ (Old English tōt(e)). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on or by a lookout hill, or toponymic, for someone from a place so named, such as Toat Farm in Pulborough (Sussex) and Toat Hill in Slinfold (Sussex). Compare Toothill .

variants.name: Tottle
meanings: 2 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name * Totel (Old English Tottel).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Toothil was born in 1247, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard De Toothill, was -17 and his mother, Cecilia De Toothill, was -21. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Modesta Eland. He died before 1336, in Fixby, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Toothil è nato il nel 1247 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard De Toothill, aveva -17 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia De Toothill, aveva -21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Modesta Eland. Morì prima del 1336, nel Fixby, Yorkshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Toothil(이)가 1247년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Toothill(은)는 -17세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia De Toothill(은)는 -21세였다. 그는 Modesta Eland(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 이전 영국 요르크실르 피스비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Toothil nasceu em 1247, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard De Toothill, tinha -17 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia De Toothill, tinha -21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Modesta Eland. Ele faleceu antes 1336, em Fixby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Toothil родился в 1247 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard De Toothill было -17 год, а матери, которую звали Cecilia De Toothill, -21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Modesta Eland. Он умер перед 1336 г. в местности фиксби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Toothil nació en 1247, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard De Toothill, tenía -17 años y su mamá, Cecilia De Toothill, tenía -21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Modesta Eland. Murió antes de 1336, en Fixby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
